title: microcos impressinervia
intro: Microcos impressinervia, also known as the Malayan calophyllum, is a species of plant in the family Calophyllaceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Microcos impressinervia include potential treatment for wounds, fever, and digestive issues, as well as being used as an antiseptic and anti-parasitic agent. Microcos impressinervia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
